exchangeRate.title: PHP:USD Exchange Rate
exchangeRate.contextHtml: YTD: Peso weakened 1.34% over past 12 months. Trading around 59 per dollar after BSP rate cut signaled end of easing cycle.

stories.title: MV Devon Bay Sinks in South China Sea - 2 Filipino Sailors Dead
stories.bodyHtml: A Singapore-flagged cargo ship with 21 Filipino crew members capsized near Scarborough Shoal. Chinese Coast Guard rescued 15 survivors; 2 died and 4 remain missing. The incident highlights risks faced by Filipino seafarers in disputed waters.

stories.title: Digital Remittances Growing Rapidly in Philippines
stories.bodyHtml: J.P. Morgan sees the Philippines at the center of Asia's cross-border remittance growth, driven by digital wallets and instant payment schemes. The 1% US remittance tax that took effect January 1 may accelerate shift to digital platforms with lower fees.

stories.title: ASEAN Para Games - Filipino Athletes Receive Bonuses
stories.bodyHtml: Filipino para athletes and coaches received ₱6,000 bonuses from the Philippine Sports Commission for the 2026 ASEAN Para Games in Thailand (January 20-26). The Philippines sent 216 athletes to the competition.

travelAdvisories.title: Active Travel Advisories
items: Deployment Suspended: Israel, Lebanon, Iran, Jordan – Regional conflict
Exercise Caution: Myanmar, Southeast Asia scam hub areas – Security concerns
